# Supper Bear

> Supper Bear is a free family meal-planning app from BRCG Digital Partners Inc. Plan the week, share it with your household, ask any recipe for substitutions, and turn it all into a one-tap grocery list. Available on iPhone (App Store) and any web browser.

## Key facts
- Price: Free. No ads, no third-party advertising trackers.
- Platforms: iPhone (iOS, App Store) and any modern web browser (phones, tablets, computers).
- Core features: weekly meal planner, recipe collection, AI "ask about this recipe" substitutions, one-tap grocery list, shared households via invite code, voice/preset kitchen setup, Face ID unlock.
- Sharing: each household has an invite code; members see the same plan and list synced in real time.
- Sign-in: Apple, Google, or passwordless email code.
- Account deletion: in-app via Household > Delete account.
- Publisher: BRCG Digital Partners Inc.

## Links
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6780084420
- Web app: https://poo-bears.vercel.app
- Privacy: https://supperbear.com/privacy
- Terms: https://supperbear.com/terms
- Support: https://supperbear.com/support
